summary: Dashboard empty state displays correctly with proper mobile layout, billing information, and free plan usage tracking. Minor brand palette inconsistency detected in authenticated surface colors that don't match the diner aesthetic.

violations.description: Authenticated dashboard surface uses neutral/gray palette instead of maintaining brand diner palette consistency with public surfaces - cream backgrounds and diner colors are absent

actions: Consider applying diner palette (cream #fff8ea backgrounds, proper brand colors) to authenticated surfaces to maintain brand consistency
Verify mobile drawer navigation remains functional at 390px viewport
Ensure billing estimate widget properly hides when unavailable (currently showing $10.00 estimate correctly)
